summary: Phase 33 — Tested 3 new feature areas (Knowledge Base Phase 2/3 PDFs/MDs, Specialist Onboarding Email Drip, Interactive QA Playbook + AI Suggester) plus Cookie Policy page. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests PASSED (test_phase33_new_features.py) covering: PDF + Markdown rendering for 4 doc slugs, specialist register → 3-row drip enqueue with day_offset [1,3,7] sent=false, dispatch-now ok+summary, cancel/{uid} ok, QA template returns 105 items with required stats keys, run creation w/ 105 pending checks, PATCH check → summary updated (pass=1, closed=1), GET /runs/{id}/markdown returns text/markdown, AI suggester returns >=6 items with code+priority+category+description and provider='claude-sonnet-4-5', run close persists closed_at, non-admin (client) returns 403 on both /admin/qa and /admin/onboarding. Frontend: UI testing BLOCKED — Emergent preview frontend returns 'Preview Unavailable!!! Our Agent is resting after inactivity' on all /* routes (login, cookies, admin). Verified via curl + Playwright; frontend supervisor service is RUNNING and localhost:3000 responds 200, so the issue is at the Emergent preview ingress (not our code). Did static code-review of all required data-testids — every selector listed in the request is present in code.

integration_issues.issue: https://propmanage-bg.preview.emergentagent.com/login, /cookies, /admin all return HTTP 404 + Emergent 'Preview Unavailable' placeholder, even though supervisor reports frontend RUNNING and http://localhost:3000/login returns 200. Backend /api/* works fine at same hostname. Likely infrastructure-side preview suspension — main agent needs to wake the preview via app.emergent.sh before any UI Playwright runs.

issues: Page title prop is 'Politica de cookies' (no diacritic) while spec/request mentions 'Politică de cookies' (with ă). Minor Romanian copy diacritic mismatch — only relevant if a strict text assertion is used.

action_items: Wake the Emergent preview from app.emergent.sh (or contact support) so that public URL /* routes serve the React SPA instead of 'Preview Unavailable'. Backend /api/* already works.
Optional copy fix: change LegalPages.jsx line 158 title from 'Politica de cookies' to 'Politică de cookies' (with ă) to match Romanian convention used elsewhere.
After preview is reachable again, run the documented Playwright flows (login admin → /admin → TRAINING → QA Playbook → create run → mark pass → AI suggester; landing footer-cookies → /cookies).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminQAPlaybook.jsx (522 lines) is close to the 700-line soft limit — consider splitting RunHeader / CheckRow / AISuggester / Landing into separate files for maintainability.

All required data-testids verified present: qa-intro, qa-run-create, qa-runs-list, qa-ai-suggester, qa-new-run-name, qa-create-run-btn, qa-run-name, qa-progress-ring, qa-filters, qa-cat-toggle-{CAT}, qa-{code}-set-{status}, qa-ai-feature-input, qa-ai-suggest-btn, cookies-page, footer-cookies.
Backend onboarding /queue returns rows under key 'recent' (not 'rows'/'queue'); fine but document in API contract.
Backend QA endpoints wrap response in {'run': {...}, 'summary': {...}} — consistent, but client must always traverse .run.

success_rate.frontend: 0% executed — blocked by Emergent preview being in 'resting' state; static code review of selectors = 100% present

test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io / Admin123! (worked for all admin tests). client@propmanage.io / Client123! (worked for 403 guard tests).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 specialist user spec_auto_{ts}@test.com + 3 onboarding rows + 1 QA run 'Test Run Auto'. Cleaned up post-run via mongosh on propmanage_db (deleted users, onboarding_emails, qa_runs matching test patterns).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase33_new_features.py is fully green and reusable as regression. Key endpoint quirks: (1) PDF/MD are GET /api/admin/docs/{slug}/pdf|markdown — NOT a 'phased-document' subpath (that was misleading in the original request). (2) Onboarding queue returns {stats, recent:[...]} — rows under 'recent'. (3) QA run responses wrap content in {'run': {...}, 'summary': {...}}; closed_at lives on run.closed_at. (4) AI suggester provider string is exactly 'claude-sonnet-4-5'. For frontend retest: preview MUST be woken first (currently shows 'Preview Unavailable'). Once awake, the data-testid map in critical_code_review_comments above is the authoritative selector list.
rca of the issue: Frontend test block — RCA: The Emergent preview ingress for hostname propmanage-bg.preview.emergentagent.com is returning the 'Preview Unavailable!!! Our Agent is resting after inactivity' page for every non-/api path. Reproduction: `curl -i https://propmanage-bg.preview.emergentagent.com/login` → HTTP/2 404, body is Emergent placeholder; same URL `/api/admin/qa/checklist/template` with admin auth → 200 + JSON. Locally `curl http://localhost:3000/login` → 200 + React SPA shell. Mitigation: not in agent scope — user/main agent must restart the preview via app.emergent.sh.
